title: Mathias Pala

{{Short description|Former France international rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=February 2023}} {{Infobox rugby league biography |name = Mathias Pala |fullname = |image = |image_size = |caption = |position = {{rlp|ce|fb|wg}} |birth_date = {{birth date and age|1989|6|14|df=y}} |birth_place = [[Carpentras]], [[Vaucluse]],
[[Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur]], [[France]] |death_date = |death_place = |height = |weight = |club1 = [[Catalans Dragons]] |year1start = 2011 |year1end = 15 |appearances1 = 32 |tries1 = 4 |goals1 = 0 |fieldgoals1 = 0 |points1 = 16 |club2 = {{nowrap|→[[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan]]}} |year2start = 2011 |year2end = 15{{small|([[RFL dual registration|DR]])}} |appearances2 = |tries2 = |goals2 = |fieldgoals2 = |points2 = |club3 = [[Leigh Centurions]] |year3start = 2015 |year3end = |appearances3 = 2 |tries3 = 0 |goals3 = 0 |fieldgoals3 = 0 |points3 = 0 |club4 = [[Balmain Tigers]] |year4start = |year4end = |appearances4 = |tries4 = |goals4 = |fieldgoals4 = |points4 = |club5 = [[RC Baho XIII]] |year5start = |year5end = |appearances5 = |tries5 = |goals5 = |fieldgoals5 = |points5 = |teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] |yearAstart = 2011 |yearAend = 16 |appearancesA = 11 |triesA = 4 |goalsA = 0 |fieldgoalsA = 0 |pointsA = 16 |updated = 18 January 2021 |source =[https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/mathias-pala/summary.html Mathias Pala] ''rugbyleagueproject.org'' |new = yes }} '''Mathias Pala''' (born 14 June 1989) is a French [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} for [[RC Baho XIII]] in the [[Elite Two Championship]]. He previously played for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] and their feeder club [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan]] in the [[Elite One Championship]] and English club [[Leigh Centurions]]. ==Background== Pala was born in [[Carpentras]], France and trained in [[Limoux]]. ==Career== He has previously played in the [[Super League]] for the [[Catalans Dragons]] and in Australia with the [[Balmain Tigers]].{{cite web |url=http://www.slstats.org/p1856/Mathias%2BPala.html |title=SLStats: Mathias Pala |accessdate=2011-10-23 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20111023010101/http://www.slstats.org/p1856/Mathias%20Pala.html |archivedate=2011-10-23 }} He represented [[France national rugby league team|France]] in 2011 against [[England national rugby league team|England]].{{cite web|url=http://www.gillette4nations.co.uk/4-nations-news/article/625/4ntv-chase-runs-hot-for|title=Rugby League International Federation|publisher=Gillette4nations.co.uk|accessdate=2015-02-27|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120611054307/http://www.gillette4nations.co.uk/4-nations-news/article/625/4ntv-chase-runs-hot-for|archive-date=2012-06-11|url-status=dead}} He is of Italian descent.{{cite web|url=http://www.ffr13.fr/index.php/competitions/championnat-de-france/elite-1/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=1516|accessdate=14 October 2012|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120616151500/http://www.ffr13.fr/index.php/competitions/championnat-de-france/elite-1/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=1516|archivedate=16 June 2012 |title=Fédération Française de Rugby à XIII}} He has also played for France in the [[2012 Autumn International Series]] as well as the [[2014 European Cup (rugby league)|2014 European Cup]]. Pala returned to the international scene in 2016, playing in a one-off [[2016 Rugby League Four Nations#France vs England|test match]] against England in Avignon. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[https://www.ffr13.fr/staff/mathias-pala/ France profile] {{DEFAULTSORT:Pala, Mathias}} [[Category:1989 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] [[Category:AS Saint Estève players]] [[Category:Balmain Ryde-Eastwood Tigers players]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French sportspeople of Italian descent]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Leigh Leopards players]] [[Category:Limoux Grizzlies players]] [[Category:Sportspeople from Carpentras]] [[Category:RC Baho XIII players]] [[Category:Rugby league wingers]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur]]
